FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.45sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fd80189aa30>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'user_list': [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}], 'test_username': 'testuser'}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1005: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/07/01 20:05:27.842777143 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842783933 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842813817 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842814589 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842833527 {
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842834298 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842847588 new <- list()
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842848309 if (!missing(width))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842863131 new$width <- width
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842863822 if (!missing(height))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842877742 new$height <- height
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842878514 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842897332 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/07/01 20:05:27.842912234 new$title <- title
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842912965 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842926765 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842927466 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842941437 new$version <- version
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842942178 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842958372 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842959043 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842973895 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842974556 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842988137 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842988898 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843001707 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843002448 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843015507 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843016218 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843031651 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843032462 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843060514 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843061255 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843075872 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843077714 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843097093 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843097834 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843124609 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843137643 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843138314 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843151920 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843152841 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843173983 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843174804 enc <- family$encoding
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843189586 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843190417 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843228469 "default"))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843242745 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843243777 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843257462 }
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843258604 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843271373 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843271873 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843281888 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843282329 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843296039 }
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843296780 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843311602 }
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843319244 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843319905 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843334767 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843335197 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843345673 domain = NA)
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843346094 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843355608 }
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843356098 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843365703 old$family <- family
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843366173 }
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843383069 version <- old$version
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843383820 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843409588 "2.0")

2026/07/01 20:05:27.843435025 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843436097 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843485721 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843486542 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843500613 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843501294 domain = NA)
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843516016 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843516677 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843535385 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843536146 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843558068 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843558779 invisible()

2026/07/01 20:05:27.842777143 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842783933 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842813817 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842814589 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842833527 {
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842834298 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842847588 new <- list()
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842848309 if (!missing(width))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842863131 new$width <- width
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842863822 if (!missing(height))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842877742 new$height <- height
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842878514 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842897332 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/07/01 20:05:27.842912234 new$title <- title
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842912965 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842926765 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842927466 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842941437 new$version <- version
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842942178 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842958372 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842959043 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842973895 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842974556 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842988137 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/01 20:05:27.842988898 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843001707 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843002448 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843015507 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843016218 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843031651 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843032462 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843060514 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843061255 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843075872 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843077714 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843097093 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843097834 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843124609 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843137643 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843138314 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843151920 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843152841 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843173983 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843174804 enc <- family$encoding
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843189586 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843190417 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843228469 "default"))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843242745 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843243777 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843257462 }
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843258604 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843271373 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843271873 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843281888 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843282329 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843296039 }
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843296780 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843311602 }
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843319244 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843319905 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843334767 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843335197 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843345673 domain = NA)
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843346094 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843355608 }
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843356098 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843365703 old$family <- family
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843366173 }
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843383069 version <- old$version
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843383820 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843409588 "2.0")

2026/07/01 20:05:27.843435025 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843436097 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843485721 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843486542 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843500613 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843501294 domain = NA)
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843516016 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843516677 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843535385 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843536146 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843558068 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/07/01 20:05:27.843558779 invisible()
